full_text:
Chai Yu śüīÁéČ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chai Yu (śüīÁéČ). Well known bell maker, argued with Du Kui over a pair of them. Cao Cao made him a horse herder. Chai Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
